Client Work
Live & deployed

Shalimar One World

LIVEReal Estate

Premium real estate lead-generation landing page for Shalimar Group — a luxury residential township in Gomti Nagar Extension, Lucknow. Features property listings (₹1.3Cr–₹4.95Cr+), lead capture forms, WhatsApp CTA, brochure downloads, floor plan gallery, and a multi-property carousel. Built for high-intent buyer conversion.

HTML/CSSJavaScriptLead GenerationMulti-PropertyWhatsApp APIResponsive
Visit Site

NIOS Admissions — SS Coaching

LIVEEducation

Full admission and lead generation website for SS Coaching, Lucknow — India's top NIOS coaching institute with 25+ years experience and 100k+ students. Bilingual content (English & Hindi), free counselling booking form, 4 academic stream cards, topper results gallery, 3-branch location info, FAQ, and multi-channel WhatsApp contact. Rated 4.8★ on Google.

HTML/CSSJavaScriptBilingual EN/HILead GenMulti-BranchSEO Optimized
Visit Site

Shahla Nafees Farmhouse

LIVEHospitality

Elegant booking and enquiry landing page for a private farmhouse resort in Lucknow. Full-screen hero with image carousel, booking availability form, transparent pricing (₹18,000/day), photo gallery with lightbox, guest testimonials, amenities showcase, video section, animated counters, and Instagram integration. Designed to evoke luxury and convert visitors into direct bookings.

DevConnect — MERN Social Platform

PERSONALFull-Stack

Full-featured social networking app for developers. Real-time messaging via Socket.io, push notifications, user profiles, follow/unfollow system, post & user search, likes, comments, and a scrollable feed — secured with JWT authentication and a clean light/dark UI.

Next.js Blog App

PERSONALNext.js

Production-ready blog platform with NextAuth.js authentication, full CRUD for posts and comments, email notifications via Nodemailer, image uploads, post categorization, and SSR/SSG hybrid architecture for blazing-fast performance.

Memories App

PERSONALMERN

A photo memory-sharing app where users upload images, write captions, like and interact with others posts. Cloudinary for image storage, Redux for global state, dark/light mode toggle, and a clean purple-themed responsive UI.

About Me

Hi, I'm
Vishal.

I'm a full-stack developer building modern web applications with the MERN stack and Next.js. I focus on clean, scalable code that solves real problems — not just code that looks good on a portfolio.

From social platforms to content management systems, I've built and shipped real projects with internship-level experience. I know what clients need: fast, professional, and reliable.

When I'm not coding, I'm learning — keeping up with the latest to make sure every project uses modern best practices.
